description: Title slide: course name and lecture topic on AI screenplays.
narration: Welcome. Today we are looking at how AI fits into screenplay work—what it can speed up, and what still needs a human eye.

description: Bullet list contrasting traditional screenplay structure with AI-assisted workflows.
narration: Classic structure still matters: acts, beats, scenes. The shift is where drafting and variation enter the loop, not whether structure exists.

description: Diagram of a pipeline from prompt to draft scenes with feedback loops.
narration: Think of this as a pipeline: prompt, draft, critique, revise. The feedback loop is where quality usually improves—not in the first generation.
